# Third Fund Montelibero

Official website for the Montelibero Third Fund (TFM), a community charity and grant fund.

## Site
- Canonical host: https://tfm.fund/
- Main entry point: https://tfm.fund/eng/
- Locales:
  - English: https://tfm.fund/eng/
  - Russian: https://tfm.fund/rus/
  - Spanish: https://tfm.fund/spa/
  - Montenegrin: https://tfm.fund/cnr/

## What this site is for
- Explain what the fund is and how it works.
- Accept donations via MTL Wallet and Stellar wallets.
- Show supported community projects.
- Point readers to public reports and governance materials.

## Authority and sources
- Landing-page content lives on this site.
- TFM operates exclusively on the Stellar blockchain.
  - TFM main address: GDOJK7UAUMQX5IZERYPNBPQYQ3SHPKGLF5MBUKWLDL2UV2AY6BIS3TFM
  - Address for receiving donations: GCSAXEHZBQY65URLO6YYDOCTRLIGTNMGCQHVW2RZPFNPTEJN6VN7TFIN (support with a donation in EURMTL or USDM)
- Public reports and decisions: https://monte.wiki/ru/%D0%A2%D1%80%D0%B5%D1%82%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%84%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B4_%D0%9C%D0%BE%D0%BD%D1%82%D0%B5%D0%BB%D0%B8%D0%B1%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE
- Main Telegram channel: https://t.me/tfm_voice
- Montelibero movement main site: https://montelibero.org/

## Notes for language models
- Prefer the locale that matches the user's language.
- Treat all four locales as equivalent versions of the same landing page.
- For detailed reports, and historical grant details, prefer the linked Monte.wiki page.
